title: Geometric Monoline
description: Ce style se caractérise par des illustrations vectorielles monolignes strictes où les sujets complexes sont réduits à des contours géométriques précis. Dépourvue de remplissage interne, d'ombrage ou de perspective, l'œuvre repose entièrement sur une épaisseur de trait uniforme, des courbes parfaites et des angles vifs pour définir la forme. Une palette limitée de couleurs de trait vibrantes se détache sur un fond plat et neutre, créant une esthétique épurée, moderne et iconographique.
description_en: This style is characterized by strict monoline vector illustrations where complex subjects are distilled into precise geometric outlines. Lacking any internal fill, shading, or perspective, the artwork relies entirely on uniform line weight, perfect curves, and sharp angles to define form. A limited palette of vibrant stroke colors stands out against a flat, neutral background, creating a clean, modern, and iconographic aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style se caractérise par des illustrations vectorielles monolignes strictes où les sujets complexes sont réduits à des contours géométriques précis. Dépourvue de remplissage interne, d'ombrage ou de perspective, l'œuvre repose entièrement sur une épaisseur de trait uniforme, des courbes parfaites et des angles vifs pour définir la forme. Une palette limitée de couleurs de trait vibrantes se détache sur un fond plat et neutre, créant une esthétique épurée, moderne et iconographique.
prompt: Strict digital vector monoline illustration, pure geometric outline art, and modern minimalist graphic design. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The entire composition must be rendered exclusively using a uniform, unvarying line weight, creating a strict monoline aesthetic. There are absolutely no solid fills, no gradients, no shading, no drop shadows, and no highlights anywhere in the image. Every element is distilled into precise geometric wireframes, utilizing mathematically perfect circles, smooth sweeping bezier curves, and sharp, calculated angular intersections. The linework is colored using a crisp, vibrant palette consisting of {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}, applied strictly to the strokes themselves against a cohesive flat backdrop. Lighting is completely non-existent, resulting in a perfectly flat, shadowless, two-dimensional graphic representation that rejects all traditional depth cues and 3D perspective. Spatial dynamics are reduced to pure topological relationships, treating the scene like a highly organized, pristine architectural blueprint or a modern minimalist iconography layout. The texture is flawlessly smooth digital vector, completely devoid of any noise, film grain, brushwork, or organic imperfections. Edge treatment relies on razor-sharp, mathematically calculated vector contours with precise butt caps and geometric joins. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. vector art, monoline illustration, geometric outlines, uniform line weight, flat 2D graphic, minimalist iconography, perfect curves, no fill, pure stroke art, blueprint style, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

The subject's edges interact cleanly with the {{background_color}}, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame, cropped naturally by the image boundaries. vector art, monoline illustration, geometric outlines, uniform line weight, flat 2D graphic, minimalist iconography, perfect curves, no fill, pure stroke art, blueprint style, isolated on background
